OUD_MAT_MEDICARE Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) - Medicare-Only Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
